# UC-12.3.14 · Ansible Playbook Unreachable Host Spike by Inventory Group

## Description

Unreachable bursts indicate network ACL changes, bastion loss, or credential rotation issues.

## Value

Prioritizes inventory segments losing connectivity before change windows close.

## Implementation

Ensure callback sends per-play aggregates; map `inventory_group` from limit or dynamic inventory metadata.

## SPL

```spl
index=iac sourcetype="ansible:result"
| stats sum(unreachable) as u count as runs by playbook, inventory_group
| eval unreachable_rate=round(100*u/runs,2)
| where runs>=10 AND unreachable_rate > 15
| sort -unreachable_rate
```

## Visualization

Bar chart (unreachable_rate by group), Table top playbooks.

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
